data.title: Lytus Technologies Holdings PTV. Ltd. is doing a 1-for-2,500 reverse stock split. No impact on shareholder rights.
data.description: Announced in Dubai, United Arab Emirates on September 25, 2025, Lytus Technologies Holdings PTV. Ltd. (OTCQB: LYTHF) revealed plans for a reverse stock split of its common shares at a ratio of 1-for-2,500. This strategic move by the company, a notable player in platform services and cutting-edge technology, will impact all shareholders evenly without changing their relative rights or ownership stakes in the Company, except for fractional shares which will be resolved separately.

data.title: Global coalition formed at UN event to promote sustainable procurement and supply chains. Launch includes founding members and joint public-private effort.
data.description: In New York on September 25, 2025, during the UN General Assembly High-level Week, the Coalition for Sustainable Procurement held its inaugural meeting. The coalition disclosed its founding members and initiated a collaborative public-private endeavor to integrate sustainability practices. This marks a significant step towards promoting sustainable procurement on a global scale.

data.title: Books were celebrated at the 2025 Booktique Awards Party at Chateau Marmont in Hollywood, cohosted by style authorities Joe Zee, Clare Vivier, and Lawren Howell.
data.description: Last week in Los Angeles, the Booktique Awards Party took place at Chateau Marmont in Hollywood, where books took center stage. The event was cohosted by popular style influencers Joe Zee, Clare Vivier, and Lawren Howell. Thirteen books from various publishers were celebrated at the event, which was attended by prominent figures in the industry.
CF PharmTech Inc Global Offering of 41.2 Million H Shares

data.title: CRV predicted to bounce to $0.78 within 2 weeks, from oversold $0.64 with RSI recovery from 35.
data.description: According to the current CRV price prediction, the cryptocurrency is experiencing oversold conditions at $0.64. This indicates a potential increase in value, with the price expected to bounce back to the resistance zone between $0.78-$0.82. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is also showing signs of recovery from 35 levels, further suggesting a positive trend in the near future.

data.description: A company based in Menlo Park, California, known as American Exceptionalism Acquisition Corp. A, revealed the pricing for its increased initial public offering on September 25, 2025. The offering includes 30,000,000 Class A ordinary shares, each priced at $10.00 per share. The shares are set to be listed on...

data.title: Oversold FLOKI expected to bounce to $0.000185 resistance within 7 days, RSI at 33.49. Technical analysis predicts a rise.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is experiencing oversold conditions as indicated by its Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 33.49. It is currently trading close to the lower support of the Bollinger Bands. Analysts utilizing technical analysis anticipate a possible rebound, targeting the resistance level at $0.000185.

data.title: ATD and AI expert Josh Cavalier team up to offer AI education to talent development pros worldwide.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia, on September 25, 2025, the Association for Talent Development (ATD) has revealed a partnership with AI specialist Josh Cavalier to introduce AI learning materials and training to ATD's worldwide audience. This collaboration with Cavalier aims to provide innovative resources for the Applying AI in Learning initiative that will impact ATD's global community.

data.title: Emerald Lake Capital Management invests in CORE Transformers, undisclosed transaction details.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California on September 25, 2025, Emerald Lake Capital Management disclosed an equity investment in CORE Transformers, a company focusing on growth in the middle market private equity sector. The specific details of the transaction were not revealed.

data.title: NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. obtains approval for Change of Business into digital assets & fintech, with support from shareholders & CSE.
data.description: Vancouver, Canada, Sept. 25, 2025 - NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. announced today that its move into the digital asset sector and the adoption of a cryptocurrency treasury management plan has been authorized by most of the Company's shareholders through written consent resolutions. This decision follows the news release from September 24, 2025. Additionally, the Canadian Securities Exchange has granted final approval for this strategic shift. NextGen, trading as CSE:NXT, OTCQB:NXTDF, and FSE:Z12, focuses on merging traditional finance markets with Web3 infrastructure.
ANZ-Roy Morgan New Zealand Consumer Confidence Index 94.6 in September from 92.0 previous month

data.title: HSBC achieves quantum milestone in algorithmic bond trading with successful test. #QuantumComputing #Fintech
data.description: A team of researchers at the financial institution HSBC have reported success in utilizing quantum computers for algorithmic bond trading during a recent experimental trial. The experiment demonstrated the potential of quantum computing in revolutionizing bond trading strategies.

data.title: Toncoin seen oversold with RSI at 23.27, may hit $3.41 by Sept 27 before $5.90 breakout potential.
data.description: The current Token (TON) price prediction indicates an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 23.27, presenting a potential bullish divergence opportunity. Through technical analysis, a short-term recovery target of $3.41 has been identified, with a potential upside of $5.90.

data.title: AT&T board declares dividend of $0.2775 per share on common shares, payable on Nov 3, 2025.
data.description: Today, in Dallas, the board of directors announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share on the company's common shares, scheduled for payment on November 3, 2025. This decision highlights the company's commitment to providing returns to shareholders.

data.title: New SEC policy change may streamline ETF approvals, impacting retail crypto investors. Experts share insights on the implications.
data.description: Industry professionals discussed the potential impact of a recent policy alteration at the US Securities and Exchange Commission on retail investors in the cryptocurrency market. The adjustment could significantly influence individuals who are not professional or institutional investors and may lead to changes in how they approach their crypto investments. This change has sparked conversation among experts regarding its implications for the broader cryptocurrency community, especially considering the sizable number of retail investors currently active in the market.

data.title: World's largest nonprofit sportfishing tournament for veterans, War Heroes on Water's eighth annual event drew over 60 yachts.
data.description: In Newport Beach, California, the eighth annual War Heroes on Water (WHOW) sportfishing tournament has recently finished, marking the beginning of lasting connections formed during the event. The tournament concluded with a weigh-in celebration on Catalina's Green Pier and a touching private awards ceremony at the Hyatt Regency Irvine. The event featured over 60 yachts, the largest fleet in its history, all donated generously for the cause.

data.title: Former Colorado Springs Police Sergeant Andrew Rutter joins Tranquility AI as Director of Investigations to enhance TimePilot.
data.description: In Laurel, Maryland, Tranquility AI, a key player in investigative technology solutions, has revealed that Andrew Rutter has become their new Director of Investigations. In this position, Mr. Rutter will collaborate with law enforcement agencies and prosecution offices across the country to enhance the effectiveness of Tranquility AI’s primary product, TimePilot. Through utilizing artificial intelligence for sorting and examining extensive digital evidence, TimePilot enables investigations to be conducted more efficiently.

data.title: Potential 15-25% recovery to $0.000018 by October 2025 predicted for SHIB due to oversold conditions. Critical support key for bounce to $0.000018-$0.000020 in 4 weeks.
data.description: The projected price for SHIB indicates that there could be a rebound to the range of $0.000018 to $0.000020 in the next four weeks due to oversold conditions. However, it is crucial for the current support levels to be maintained in order for this prediction to materialize.

data.title: Fibernow improves customer service with industry-leading fiber technology, backed by DigitalBridge Group, enhancing customer experience. Onshore Support Center partnership enhances customer service platform.
data.description: In Miami, Fibernow, a prominent fiber broadband provider supported by DigitalBridge Group (NYSE: DBRG), has made significant improvements to its customer service operations. These enhancements aim to match the excellence of the company's cutting-edge fiber technology with superior customer care. Throughout the last year, Fibernow has bolstered its customer service capabilities with various strategic initiatives. These include establishing an Onshore Support Center in collaboration with a local outsourcing provider.

data.title: Moby raises $5M seed round at $30M valuation, led by IA Capital Group, with participation from Alumni Ventures.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, Moby, a platform aiming to make Wall Street-level investing insights more accessible, revealed the completion of a $5 million seed funding round. This funding round resulted in a $30 million valuation for the company. IA Capital Group took the lead in this investment, and other contributors included Alumni Ventures along with several notable angel investors.
